what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 stroke-only SVG icon depicting a pie chart with a main circular segment and a smaller wedge segment.
observations: The root svg declares a 24 by 24 viewBox with width and height set to 24.
The icon uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor".
Stroke styling is set to 1.5 width with round line caps and joins.
Two path elements draw the main pie-chart shape and an upper-right wedge shape.
standouts: The icon inherits color from currentColor.
The graphic is composed entirely of two path elements.
There are no embedded labels, titles, IDs, classes, or metadata.
conventions: Follows common SVG icon conventions with a 24x24 canvas, no fill, currentColor stroke, and rounded stroke joins.
Keeps styling inline on the root svg rather than using CSS classes.
Uses compact path data without separate grouping elements.
concerns: The SVG has no title, description, role, or aria attributes for accessibility context.
notes: A compact currentColor pie-chart icon asset drawn with two stroked paths.
questions: Should this decorative or semantic icon carry accessibility metadata in its intended usage context?
purpose_vs_actual: The file path and filename indicate a pie-chart icon, and the SVG content renders a pie-chart-style glyph.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable pie-chart icon that can adopt surrounding text or UI color through currentColor.
contribution: Contributes a compact stroke-based pie-chart icon asset for representing chart, analytics, or segmented data concepts in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 SVG pie-chart icon using currentColor strokes, no fill, and two path elements for the main chart shape and wedge segment.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a reusable theme-colored pie-chart icon in an SVG icon set.
